cleavage agent: the samples were digested with trypsin FASP.
collision energy: HCD fragmentation at 30% of normalized collision energy.
enrichment method: CAPTURE was carried out essentially as described in.
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation at 30% of normalized collision energy.
instrument: coupled in line a Q Exactive mass spectrometer equipped with an EASY-spray source.
reduction reagent: freshly added 1 mM DTT and complete EDTA-free protease inhibitor cocktail.
reduction concentration: freshly added 1 mM DTT and complete EDTA-free protease inhibitor cocktail.
